seo.title: Building Customer Support with Mastra + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build customer support with Mastra + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building customer support agents with Mastra enables powerful RAG workflows with CRM integrations and tool-calling for ticket management. However, high-risk scenarios like PII exposure and policy violations demand robust guardrails. Vex provides middleware verification to ensure response accuracy, compliance, and safe escalations in production deployments.

architectureOverview.heading: Customer Support Architecture with Mastra
architectureOverview.description:
Mastra orchestrates a RAG agent that retrieves from knowledge bases and CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce) for order lookups and ticket creation. The workflow includes memory retrieval for conversation history, LLM reasoning for response generation, and tool calls for actions like updating tickets or escalating issues. Middleware layers handle validation between steps to prevent data propagation errors.

Key components include: AgentExecutor for tool orchestration, VectorStore for KB retrieval, and CRM connectors for real-time data sync. Failures often occur when stale CRM data confuses the agent or malformed tool outputs break workflows.

Vex integrates as pipeline middleware to verify outputs at critical junctions: post-retrieval, pre-tool-call, and final response generation.

risks.name: Workflow step outputs not validated between transitions
risks.description: Unvalidated KB retrieval injects irrelevant context, causing hallucinated order details
risks.mitigation: Vex schema validation middleware between retrieval and LLM steps

risks.name: Agent tool calls returning malformed data
risks.description: CRM lookup returns partial order data, breaking ticket creation schema
risks.mitigation: Vex JSON schema enforcement on tool outputs before workflow continuation

risks.name: Memory retrieval injecting stale context
risks.description: Previous conversation context contains outdated customer info from resolved tickets
risks.mitigation: Vex temporal validation and staleness checks on memory retrieval

risks.name: Sync integration data causing agent confusion
risks.description: Real-time CRM sync conflicts with KB data, creating contradictory order status
risks.mitigation: Vex data consistency checks across multiple retrieval sources
